\tzpentry{ID5496}{Encode Decode Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5496 introduces Encode Decode Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathrm{encode}(\mathrm{decode}(a)) = a\quad \text{for sampled }a\in\mathcal{A}. \end{align}
